creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit in branch main references this bug:

URL: https://cgit.FreeBSD.org/ports/commit/?id=8569a61b68f0b23c65c3ba4d39ecb7d750c2ae11

commit 8569a61b68f0b23c65c3ba4d39ecb7d750c2ae11
Author:     Koichiro Iwao <meta@FreeBSD.org>
AuthorDate: 2023-03-14 01:16:22 +0000
Commit:     Koichiro Iwao <meta@FreeBSD.org>
CommitDate: 2023-03-14 01:19:10 +0000

    sysutils/yank: Update to 1.3.0

    * Update to 1.3.0
    * Pass maintainetship to submitter
    * Pet portfmt
    * Change x11 option to CLIPBOARD option: CLIPBOARD is more descriptive.
    * CLIPBOARD is enabled by default: users using this port will probably
      want to copy the selected entry to the clipboard.

    Changes:        https://github.com/mptre/yank/blob/v1.3.0/CHANGELOG.md
    PR:             270046

 2 files changed, 12 insertions(+), 9 deletions(-)
